title: onoseris albicans
intro: Onoseris albicans, a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, is a flowering plant native to the Andean region of South America. Traditionally, Onoseris albicans has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. Its health benefits include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as being used as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Onoseris albicans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
